summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Pokemon Discord Bot Dashboard. Backend API testing shows 94.1% success rate (16/17 endpoints working). Frontend testing shows all pages loading correctly with proper Pokemon data integration, navigation, and UI functionality.
passed_tests: Dashboard page loads with stats cards and featured Pokemon
Pokedex page loads with Pokemon grid, search, and filters
Leaderboard page loads with tabs and empty state messages
Type Chart page loads with full 18x18 effectiveness matrix
Navigation between all pages works correctly
Pokemon cards display with proper images, names, types, and IDs
Type and region filters are functional
Responsive design and proper dark theme
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix the /api/global/settings endpoint returning 520 error. This is a minor issue that doesn't affect core functionality but should be resolved for completeness.
